title: PRRW Travel posting RW609 + ZFI020 for IIEP traveler on UNES-funded trip

error_messages.text: For IIEP company code, only use business area PAR, IBA or FEL

root_cause_summary: Two independent factors converged: (1) NEW intercompany trip — first time the employee's UNES-fund posting created a cross-company-code document, exposing that LHRTSF01.abap:852 only fills GSBER for same-company lines; (2) OLD vendor master defect — vendor created in 2016 with KTOKK=SCSA → LFB1.AKONT=2021011 in IIEP, which is the only AKONT not covered by GGB1 substitution rule 3IIEP###002 (which covers 2021042/2021061). All three fallback safety nets are independently broken: BAdI PA0027-02 expired 2021-01-31, ZXTRVU05 inst_fund_ba_wbs_cc commented out for non-UNES, GGB1 rule has no entry for HKONT=2021011.
code_validation_chain: LHRTSF01.abap:852 IF epk-bukst = epk-bukrs --> NO MATCH (IIEP <> UNES) --> GSBER stays empty
LHRTSF01.abap:1693 CLEAR epk-gsber on vendor lines (koart=K, ktosl=HRP)
ZCL_IM_TRIP_POST_FI_CM00A.abap:12-37 reads PA0027-02 --> expired 2021 --> CHECK sy-subrc exits
ZXTRVU05.abap:63 WHEN OTHERS --> inst_fund_ba_wbs_cc COMMENTED OUT
LHRTSU05.abap:155 BAPI_ACC_EMPLOYEE_PAY_POST returns error --> wrap as RW609 + ZFI020 text

fix_path.immediate: PA30 — Extend PA0027 subtype 02 for vendor 10133079 (IIEP/PAR, current dates) — unblocks Rita today
fix_path.structural: FK02 — Change LFA1.KTOKK from SCSA to UNES for vendor 10133079 (corrects LFB1.AKONT IIEP from 2021011 to 2021042 which is GGB1-covered)
preventive: YFI_BASU_MOD — Add HKONT=2021011 to YTFI_BA_SUBST for IIEP (no transport) so any future SCSA-GL exposure is auto-substituted
GGB1 — Add HKONT=2021011 to substitution rule 3IIEP###002 (transported)
ZXTRVU05 — Uncomment inst_fund_ba_wbs_cc in WHEN OTHERS branch (transported, requires testing)
Run vendor_master_integrity_check.py monthly to surface any other vendor with outlier AKONT vs same-KTOKK peers

related_claims.claim: VENDOR account group KTOKK=SCSA uses AKONT=2021011 which has NO GGB1 substitution rule for business area
Travel advance posting requires BUKRS=BUKST for GSBER propagation in LHRTSF01

evidence_extracted_this_incident.code_extracted: 34 SAP standard files (24,559 lines) in extracted_code/SAP_STANDARD/TV_TRAVEL/

lessons: When an incident exposes a NEW domain (Travel), create a dedicated knowledge/domains/<DOMAIN>/ folder before closing.

Always cross-check the configuration source-of-truth table. We checked YTFI_BA_SUBST (the user-friendly maintenance persistence) but the real GGB1 rules live in GB901/GB922 — which had to be extracted mid-incident.
An invisible 10-year defect can surface from a single new combination of inputs (employee fund change + intercompany scenario).
open_followups: Quantify MGIE/ICBA exposure (KU-017) — both have travelers using GL 2021011 in same-company mode today
Confirm with Travel/HR team whether intercompany was intentional in trip 0101004544 or a user error
Audit PA0027 subtype 02 expirations across all employees (BAdI safety net broken systemically?)
chain_anchor_note: Code-based incident — anchors are file:line in extracted_code/. All 5 steps validated against ABAP source.

title: F-53 manual payment writes XREF1/XREF2='HQ' instead of 'JAK' for Jakarta user
primary_subject: AL_JONATHAN USR05.Y_USERFO='HQ' → XREF tagging wrong on all his F-53 postings
root_cause_summary: AL_JONATHAN's USR05 SU3 parameter Y_USERFO='HQ' instead of 'JAK'. YRGGBS00 form UXR1 (line 996) writes bseg_xref1 = usr05-parva unconditionally (guard commented out). UXR2 (line 1024) writes bseg_xref2 = usr05-parva when XREF2 is blank (always true on F-53 since the screen hides the field). Both run at callpoint 3 under GB922 SUBSTID='UNESCO' steps 005/006 with empty GB905 prerequisites (fires unconditionally on every BSEG line). The code works as designed; the defect is master data only. Independent confirmation via A_HIZKIA (also Jakarta, Y_USERFO='JAK' verified) manually correcting his docs via FBL3N since 2026-02-16. End-to-end gap: VALID='UNES' (12 steps in GB931) has ZERO steps that check XREF fields; F-53/FBZ2 is in ZERO validation prerequisites; 21,754 manual FBL3N/FBL1N/FB02 corrections in Q1 2026 on UNES BELEG by 242 users show this is systemic.
code_validation_chain: YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:230 exits-name='UXR1' (substitution exit registered)
YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:235 exits-name='UXR2' (substitution exit registered)
YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:996 FORM uxr1: SELECT usr05 WHERE parid='Y_USERFO' → bseg_xref1 = usr05-parva (guard IF bseg_xref1=space commented out at line 998 — always overwrites)
YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:1007 SELECT yfo_codes WHERE focod=bseg_xref1 → MESSAGE w018(zfi) warning if missing (non-blocking)
YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:1024 FORM uxr2: IF bseg_xref2=space → SELECT usr05 Y_USERFO → bseg_xref2 = usr05-parva (no validation in auto-write branch)
YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:1035 ELSE branch (user-typed XREF2) → SELECT yfo_codes → MESSAGE e018(zfi) hard error if missing
YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:1050-1119 FORM uzls: derives bseg_zlsch from bseg_xref2 per company code
Live RFC 2026-04-09: USR05 WHERE BNAME='AL_JONATHAN' AND PARID='Y_USERFO' → PARVA='HQ'
Live RFC 2026-04-09: PA0001 WHERE PERNR=10175236 → WERKS='ID00' BTRTL='JKT' (HR master says Jakarta)
Live RFC 2026-04-09: BSAK for 10 of his FBZ2 docs → ALL have XREF1='HQ' XREF2='HQ'
CDPOS 3100003438/2026 CHANGENR=0118205716: XREF1 'HQ'→'JAK' by A_HIZKIA via FBL3N on 2026-02-16 — proves substitution fired at posting time (VALUE_OLD='HQ')
CDPOS 3100003439/2026 CHANGENR=0118205748: same pattern
RFC extracted GB93 (17 rows) + GB931 (12 steps for VALID='UNES') on 2026-04-09: confirms F-53/FBZ2 in ZERO validation prerequisites
A_HIZKIA USR05 Y_USERFO='JAK' verified — independent confirmation of correct target value

fix_path.blocking_prerequisite: Verify 'JAK' exists in YFO_CODES.FOCOD via SE16N. If not, add row via SM30 BEFORE SU3 change. Otherwise w018 warning fires on every posting and e018 hard error if user ever types 'JAK' manually (KU-027).
fix_path.tactical: SU3 / SU01 → AL_JONATHAN → Parameters → Y_USERFO: 'HQ' → 'JAK'. Smoke test with a test F-53 posting. Verify ZLSCH downstream behavior (will become 'O' for JAK — confirm with Jakarta treasury).
fix_path.strategic_master_data: Run PA0001×PA0105×USR05 audit query (knowledge/domains/Treasury/xref_office_tagging_model.md §7.2) to enumerate all AL_JONATHAN-class drifted users. Batch-correct.
fix_path.strategic_validation: Add 13th step to VALID='UNES' that checks BSEG-XREF1 against HR-derived expected office (see xref_office_tagging_model.md §7.3).
fix_path.strategic_code: Close UXR1 overwrite gap (re-enable IF bseg_xref1=space guard at line 998) — separate transport.

evidence_extracted_this_incident: CDPOS (2 A_HIZKIA FBL3N changes with XREF1 HQ→JAK proof)
CDHDR (full BELEG change scan for AL_JONATHAN window)
GB931 (12 rows for VALID='UNES' — full validation step map)
lessons: feedback_main_agent_holds_incident_context: do not delegate the 7-step workflow to a subagent
feedback_read_emails_in_main_agent: read .eml directly in the main agent
feedback_user_term_to_sap_field_translation: section 1 of every incident report needs the terminology table
feedback_psm_extensions_is_fi_substitution_home: read PSM/EXTENSIONS autopsy docs at the start of any FI substitution/validation incident
feedback_bseg_union_has_no_xref: bseg_union does not carry XREF columns — use live RFC
feedback_metadata_vs_real_bseg_lines: BSCHL=27/37 zero-balance pair is metadata, not a real business line
feedback_process_before_root_cause: write 'how it should work' before 'why it fails'
feedback_no_learning_capture_mid_investigation: no knowledge capture until user confirms conclusions
feedback_brain_rebuild_after_finalized: rebuild is the LAST step

wrong_path_session_050.what_happened: Session #050 subagent chased FMDERIVE exit ZXFMDTU02_RPY hardcoded FICTR='UNESCO' (a real but unrelated observation) instead of the actual XREF1/XREF2 substitution in YRGGBS00.
wrong_path_session_050.cost: 154K tokens burned, wrong root cause, needed full reset

chain_anchor_note: Hybrid incident — steps 0-6 are YRGGBS00_SOURCE.txt:line anchors (code), steps 7-13 are table:key=value anchors from Live RFC/CDPOS queries (data evidence). All 14 steps verifiable; step 13 uses BNAME+PARID filter pattern without a line number because it is a data lookup, not a code cite.

title: Add Said OULD AHMEDOU VOFFAL to UIS BCM signatory panel
primary_subject: PERNR 10092400 Said OULD AHMEDOU VOFFAL (SAP user S_VOFFAL)
root_cause_summary: Not a defect. Operational change request forwarded from TRS. Said returned as UNESCO staff on 2026-03-22 (PA0002 new record) and was reinstated on the UIS Citibank Canada authorized signatory panel by TRS letter FIN.8/MOD/10.0000003625 dated 02/04/2026. His prior UIS BCM assignments had expired between 2023-10-04 and 2024-01-17 during his absence.
code_validation_chain: PA0002 PERNR=10092400 -> new record BEGDA=20260322 ENDDA=99991231 (returning employee)
PA0105 SUBTY=0001 PERNR=10092400 -> USRID=S_VOFFAL
USR02 BNAME=S_VOFFAL -> UFLAG=0 GLTGV=20260402 GLTGB=20280319 USTYP=A
HRP1001 RY=50010054 SOBID=10092400 historical row BEGDA=20160303 ENDDA=20231004 (expired)
HRP1001 RY=50036801 SOBID=10092400 historical row BEGDA=20211018 ENDDA=20231004 (expired)
Post-change HRP1001 RY=50010054 SOBID=10092400 BEGDA=20260409 ENDDA=99991231 (verified)
Post-change HRP1001 RY=50036801 SOBID=10092400 BEGDA=20260409 ENDDA=99991231 (verified)

fix_path.immediate: DBS added 2 HRP1001 rows via OOCU_RESP in P01 (SOBID=10092400, BEGDA=20260409, ENDDA=99991231) on 2026-04-09. BEGDA used execution date instead of letter date 2026-04-02 (7-day audit gap, low material risk).
preventive: Run bcm_signatory_reconciliation_check.py after every BCM signatory change to catch drift automatically
Store each bank carton under Zagentexecution/quality_checks/cartons/<entity>_<bank>_<yyyymmdd>.txt for future diffs
When executing future changes, use TRS letter effective date as BEGDA, not execution date

side_findings: Ghost PERNR 10567156 for Svein OESTTVEIT on RY 50010054 + 50036801 (logged as dq_ghost_pernr_bcm_oesttveit)
Possible UIS panel drift STEPHENSON/ZHANG vs Citibank Canada carton (logged as uq_uis_non_citibank_signatories)
Role-split inconsistency YLI-HIETANEN/SANNEH on UIS rules (logged as uq_uis_bcm_role_split_consistency)

part2_cleanup.trigger: Business confirmation to align SAP exactly with Citibank Canada carton 02/04/2026
part2_cleanup.intermediate_error_caught: DBS first added Svein 10067156 to IIEP Validation (RY 50010087) instead of UIS Validation (RY 50036801). Caught by reconciliation check (role-split warning flagged Svein on COM but not on INI for UIS; manual P01 read showed he was on IIEP instead). DBS reversed and redid correctly.

title: Budget Rate custom solution allows cross-currency consumption against EUR-reserved FR -> AVC pool drift -> FMAVC005
reporter: Laetitia Vonthron (adm.cad) -> Christina Lopez-Chemouny -> Yimiao Guo -> Illya Konakov -> Pablo Lopez
primary_subject: FR 3250117351 line 39 (EUR carryforward to 2026, fund 3110111021 / FUNDSCTR PAX / CMMTITEM TC); EqG ticket reimbursement for SG Bivini Mangue
error_messages: FMAVC005 Annual budget exceeded by 0,87 USD (FM Availability Control) for document item 00002
root_cause_summary: 15-member ZFIX_EXCHANGERATE composite has gate-input asymmetry: Camp A (FR-anchored: CHECK_CONS, EF_FUND_RESERVATION, FUNDBLOCK) always fires for EUR FRs; Camp B (posting-anchored: PAYCOMMIT, NEW_ITEM, AVC, KBLEW, FI) silently skips when posting currency is not EUR. FR persisted at BR (1.09529); consumption persisted at identity. AVC pool drifts fund-by-fund until cover-group hits zero headroom. Vonthron's fund 3110111021/PAX/TC has $12,897.80 budget exactly matched by $12,897.80 of carryforward FR commitments -> Available=0 -> any new USD posting fires FMAVC005.
code_validation_chain: extracted_code/CLAS/YCL_FM_BR_EXCHANGE_RATE_BL/CM00A line 8: APPEND 'EUR' to mr_waers (the perimeter line)
extracted_code/CLAS/YCL_FM_BR_EXCHANGE_RATE_BL/CM004: check_conditions exits abap_false if iv_waers NOT IN mr_waers
ZFIX_EXCHANGERATE_CHECK_CONS Enh1 (Camp A): iv_waers = m_r_doc->m_f_kblk-waers (FR header EUR) -> PASS -> recalc -> Enh2 RESTORE original (in-memory only, no persistence)
ZFIX_EXCHANGERATE_NEW_ITEM (Camp B): iv_waers = c_f_fmoi-twaer (USD for USD posting) -> FAIL -> no recalc
ZFIX_EXCHANGERATE_AVC Enh1+3 (Camp B): iv_waers = <ls_fmioi>-twaer / <ls_fmifiit>-twaer per-row -> mixed, USD rows skip
ZFIX_EXCHANGERATE_KBLEW (Camp B): iv_waers = ls_tr_kblew-waers (USD) -> FAIL -> no recalc
ZFIX_EXCHANGERATE_FI (Camp B): iv_waers = <ls_fmifiit>-twaer (USD) -> FAIL -> no recalc + no audit + mt_avc_fund not appended -> fmavc_reinit_on_event handler never registered
FMAVCT(RLDNR=9H,RFIKRS=UNES,RYEAR=2026,RFUND=3110111021,RFUNDSCTR=PAX,RCMMTITEM=TC) ALLOCTYPE_9=KBFC HSL01=12,897.80 USD
Open FR commitments same key: 5 lines (RFPOS 38/39/40/43/45 of FR 3250117351) summing to $12,897.80
Available = 12,897.80 - 12,897.80 = 0 -> FMAVC005 fires on any positive posting

fix_path.immediate_workaround: Post the EqG invoice in EUR (validated by Konakov 2026-03-30 'when I try to post the invoice in EUR instead of USD it works fine'). Use XOF->EUR rate at translation date.
fix_path.preventive_recommended: Add validation in CL_FM_EF_POSITION->CHECK_CONSUMPTION: IF check_br_is_active() AND m_r_doc->m_f_kblk-waers='EUR' AND m_f_kblp-gsber='GEF' AND fund_type IN mr_fund_type AND consumption_doc-waers <> 'EUR' THEN MESSAGE 'Z_BR_001' TYPE 'E'. Stops drift at user-input layer.
fix_path.corrective_alternative: Activate convert_to_currency_2 (Staff logic) in Camp B enhancements to dispatch USD through USD-UNORE -> EUR @ M -> USD @ EURX double-hop. Method exists, complete, only called from IF 1=2 dead branches today.
fix_path.cleanup: After preventive validation deploys: one-time FMAVCREINIT on 26 affected funds for 2026 GJAHR ledger 9H to clear accumulated drift.
PMO_items: H38: Cleanup ZFIX_BR_AVC_EXCLUSIONS dead code from D01+V01

chain_anchor_note: Mixed incident — steps 0-1 are file:line in extracted_code/CLAS/, steps 2-6 are ENHO_name + Enh_block references (valid: ENHO name is primary key in TADIR + line within ENHO is unambiguous per-member), step 7 is FMAVCT table+composite-key, steps 8-9 are derived aggregations. All 10 steps verifiable against extracted source or Gold DB.

root_cause_mechanism: PUT_BSIS SELECT on table BSIS ran past rdisp/max_wprun_time via a non-selective access path. Two drivers: (1) HKONT scope possibly resolved from a YBANK_* set; J_DAVANEs primary GL 0001094424 (ECO09 MZN) is NOT in any YBANK_* set (233 of 383 distinct T012K HKONTs uncovered, 61 percent); empty set expansion degrades SELECT to BUKRS-only scan = 2,005,304 BSIS rows for UNES. (2) BUDAT / AUGDT range open combined with (1). SAP-note text embedded in the dump explicitly names access without suitable index and result set too large. Batch executions of YTBAE002 succeeded 5 times in March 2026 (TBTCO status F) because batch has no dispatcher time cap -- dialog vs batch is the trigger, not UBA01 config churn.

network_path_reproduction.cite: User-confirmed three-path A/B/C test 2026-04-20. Binary outcome correlates 1:1 with network path. Same program, same data, same P01 server. Promotes root_cause tier from TIER_2 (code + single reproduction) to TIER_1 (code + multi-path empirical).

source_extracted_method: pyrfc SNC/SSO on D01 via RPY_PROGRAM_READ (D01 ADT HTTP Basic blocked — password locked)
root_cause_mechanism_detail: YTBAE002.abap:27 declares CONSTANTS: GC_MOD TYPE C VALUE 'E' (SAP CALL TRANSACTION mode 'Display errors only, opens SAPGUI on BDC error'). The program issues four CALL TRANSACTION ... USING BDCDTAB MODE GC_MOD MESSAGES INTO Y_MESSTAB inside the GET bsis / LDB_PROCESS iteration body: YTBAE002.abap:723 (FB08 reverse), :771 (F-04 post-with-clearing), :819 (FBRA reset cleared), :853 (FB08 second branch). On slow WAN paths (Maputo field office) the cumulative GUI round-trip per BDC error exceeds rdisp/max_wprun_time → dispatcher aborts with TIME_OUT at whatever SELECT the work-process is waiting in (SAPDBSDF:1983 PUT_BSIS in this case). Errors are already captured in Y_MESSTAB at each call site and persisted by PROC_RECONCIL_MESS_ADD at :754/:795/:840/:874 into GT_RECONCIL_MESS for the list output — so silent capture is already wired. Fix: change line 27 'E' → 'N'.
root_cause_code_anchor: YTBAE002.abap:27 (primary) + YTBAE002.abap:723, :771, :819, :853 (the four CALL TRANSACTION sites)
root_cause_evidence_tier: TIER_2 (code + one observed incident + user HQ reproduction in ~2 s on fast LAN, same program same data)
root_cause_final_blocker: NONE - user HQ reproduction in ~2 seconds decisively isolated network axis; no further input needed from J_DAVANE
fix_blast_radius: zero behavioral change on happy path; edge case is a user who relied on interactive BDC dialog to correct on-the-fly — that user now sees captured error in list and re-runs
related_claims_final: claim-006906-bank-not-in-ybank-set (id=52, PREVENTIVE, orthogonal to this incident)
root_cause_mechanism_superseded_provisio: Empty-RANGE-to-unbounded-LDB-scan hypothesis (Session #057, Claim 53) was demoted Session #058. Falsifying evidence: (a) J_DAVANE plausible ECO09/MZN01 input returns non-empty GR_SAKNR_OI via SKB1:1098 (0001194424, XOPVW='X') — the empty-range branch does not fire; (b) live BSIS probe on 0001194424 = 13 rows (cannot TIME_OUT on volume); (c) user reproduced same program from HQ in ~2 seconds (isolates network, not scan volume, as the decisive axis). Claim 53 stays active as LATENT defect — real code pattern bug but did not trigger this dump.
title: Maputo field-office accountant cannot complete monthly MZN bank reconciliation 'download' — likely UBA01 rollout collateral
reporter: Davane, Josina (FU/MAP — j.davane@unesco.org, sap bname J_DAVANE)
primary_subject: J_DAVANE monthly MZN bank reconciliation download step fails
bukrs_mozambique: UNES (Maputo is NOT a dedicated BUKRS — verified via T001)
verbatim_user_description: I am accounting difficulties in downloading MZN Bank reconciliation. It happened last month and only managed almost the end of the month.
code_validation_chain: PROVISIONAL - no file:line code trace yet - TCODE not confirmed
Gold DB T001 — confirmed no Mozambique BUKRS (0 rows with WAERS='MZN' OR LAND1='MZ')
Gold DB T012 BANKS='MZ' — 3 rows: BST01, BST02, ECO09 (UBA01 configured 2026-04-08 per INC-000005586 retro, not yet in Gold DB extraction)
Gold DB T012K WAERS IN ('MZN','MZM') — BST01/MZM01 MZN GL 1022424, BST02/MZM01 MZM (deprecated) GL 1022814, ECO09/MZN01 MZN GL 1094424
Gold DB FEBKO_2024_2026 for MZ banks — only BST01 has data (327 rows, stopped 2025-04-17); ECO09/BST02/UBA01 have ZERO rows ever
Gold DB bseg_union HKONT IN ('0001065424','0001165424','0001065421','0001165421') — ZERO postings on UBA01 GLs despite 2026-04-08 P01 config close
Gold DB bseg_union ECO09 sub-bank (1194424/1194421) 2026 — 191 items cleared in Jan+Feb, first open sub-bank items in March (3 uncleared)
Gold DB bkpf USNAM='J_DAVANE' — 1,412 docs, all MAP-tagged, active 2024-01-15 to 2026-03-12, pattern = MIRO/FB60/FBZ2 invoice+payment accountant

RUNTIME IDENTITY CONFIRMED AT TIER_1: TCODE=YTR3, program=YTBAE002, error=TIME_OUT, form=PUT_BSIS, include=SAPDBSDF line 1983, user=J_DAVANE, 2026-04-20 13:51:49. YFI_BANK_RECONCILIATION hypothesis FALSIFIED.

YTBAE002 source extracted via pyrfc SNC. 3,422 lines, no INCLUDEs, no Y/Z deps. Scope via SKB1 not YBANK sets. Claim 52 falsified as causal for this incident (orthogonal). Hypothesis became empty-range-unbounded-LDB-scan at :1366 (Claim 53).

For J_DAVANE's plausible input ECO09/MZN01, SKB1 returns 0001194424 with XOPVW='X' → GR_SAKNR_OI non-empty → empty-range path does not fire. Live BSIS on 0001194424 = 13 rows (trivial). Claim 53 demoted to LATENT defect.

FINAL ROOT CAUSE. User reproduced same program same data from HQ (fast LAN) in ~2 seconds with no dump. Isolates NETWORK as the decisive axis. Combined with source trace of MODE 'E' + four CALL TRANSACTION sites in LDB loop → root cause: YTBAE002.abap:27 GC_MOD='E'. Claim 54 added (TIER_2 confirmed code-backed). Fix written at Zagentexecution/fixes/INC-000006906/YTBAE002_fix.abap.

root_cause_runtime_identity: J_DAVANE ran dialog TCODE YTR3 on P01/350 at 2026-04-20 13:51:49; YTR3 invokes custom Y-program YTBAE002 which drives SAP logical database SAPDBSDF. Terminated with runtime error TIME_OUT inside form PUT_BSIS at include SAPDBSDF line 1983 (the BSIS SELECT). Evidence: user-provided ST22 screenshot.
root_cause_summary_provisional_SUPERSEDE: PIVOTED 2026-04-20: Josina runs YFI_BANK1 (YFI_BANK_RECONCILIATION) and hits an ABAP short dump at the ALV export ("download") step. The program plus class YCL_FI_BANK_RECONCILIATION_BL were built 2023-04 through 2023-06 by external consultant N_MENARD in 10 transports and have had ZERO changes since 2023-06-29 -- so this is a latent data-driven defect, not a regression. Rank-1 predicted dump: COMPUTE_INT_ZERODIVIDE inside GET_DELAY/aging calc when FEBKO has no rows for the selected period/bank (ECO09/MZN01 has 0 FEBKO rows ever; BST01/MZM01 stopped 2025-04-17). Rank-2: TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED during PREPARE_DETAILED_DATA against 686 uncleared BSIS items on GL 0001022424. Rank-3: CONVT_NO_NUMBER if WAERS=MZM (deprecated) on BST02 is touched. Rank-4: OBJECTS_OBJREF_NOT_ASSIGNED in HANDLE_USER_COMMAND on empty ALV. SECONDARY (demoted): UBA01 / YBANK_ACCOUNTS_FO_OTH set transport collateral. REQUIRES: (a) source extraction of the 4 objects via sap_adt_api; (b) live ST22 dump read for J_DAVANE 2026-04-13..17.
